checks.floquet_unitary: U_f = exp(-i H_2) exp(-i H_1), with T1=T2=1
checks.h2_diagonal: H_2=sum_i J_i^z sigma_i^z sigma_{i+1}^z + B_i^z sigma_i^z
checks.subharmonic_peak: DTC response is accepted by peak locking near frequency 1/2
checks.endpoint_mutual_information: Two-site reduced density matrix keeps axes as ket_left, ket_right, bra_left, bra_right before tracing
